---
title: "GeoAI Arctic Challenge"
toc: true
toc-location: left
toc-title: "Resources"
---

# Resources

A central hub for help, learning materials, and policies for the **GeoAI Arctic Challenge**.

> 💡 Tip: If you’re new here, start with the **Quick Links** below.

## Quick Links

<style>
  .card-grid { display:grid; gap:1rem; grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fit,minmax(220px,1fr)); }
  .card { border:1px solid #e5e7eb; border-radius:12px; padding:1rem; }
  .card h3 { margin:0 0 .25rem 0; font-size:1.05rem; }
  .muted { color:#6b7280; font-size:.95rem; }
</style>

<div class="card-grid">

<div class="card">
  <h3>📘 Starter Materials</h3>
  <p class="muted">Helper scripts to load data, inspect labels, validate submissions, and encode masks.</p>
  <p><a href="https://www.codabench.org/competitions/10283/">Open Codabench files</a></p>
</div>

<div class="card">
  <h3>🌍 Dataset Page</h3>
  <p class="muted">Data description, formats, and visualization gallery.</p>
  <p><a href="./dataset.qmd">View dataset</a></p>
</div>

<div class="card">
  <h3>🧭 Participate</h3>
  <p class="muted">Step-by-step guide to register, submit, and score.</p>
  <p><a href="./participate.qmd">How to participate</a></p>
</div>

<div class="card">
  <h3>🏆 Leaderboard</h3>
  <p class="muted">Track your standing and compare approaches.</p>
  <p><a href="https://www.codabench.org/competitions/10283/">Open competition page</a></p>
</div>

<div class="card">
  <h3>💬 Discussion Forum</h3>
  <p class="muted">Ask questions and share insights with peers.</p>
  <p><a href="https://www.codabench.org/competitions/10283/forum">Go to forum</a></p>
</div>

<div class="card">
  <h3>📧 Contact</h3>
  <p class="muted">Email the organizing team for help.</p>
  <p><a href="mailto:wenwen@asu.edu">wenwen@asu.edu</a></p>
</div>

</div>

---

## Contact Us

- **Competition support:** [wenwen@asu.edu](mailto:wenwen@asu.edu), [chiayuhsu@asu.edu](mailto:chiayuhsu@asu.edu)
- **Technical Q&A:** Use the [Codabench forum](https://www.codabench.org/competitions/10283/forum) for public questions  

## Tutorials & Learning Materials

### Official
- **Starter materials:** The Codabench files include helper scripts for loading images, inspecting labels, validating submissions, and encoding masks.
- **Submission format mini-guide:** See **Participate -> Submission Format** for the COCO results JSON schema.

### External
- **PyTorch segmentation recipes** (Instance/semantic fundamentals) [link](https://docs.pytorch.org/tutorials/intermediate/torchvision_tutorial.html)
- **Detectron2 / MaskRCNN** quickstarts (for instance masks) [link](https://detectron2.readthedocs.io/en/stable/tutorials/getting_started.html)
- **COCO mask utilities** (pycocotools API reference) [link](https://github.com/cocodataset/cocoapi)
- **NumPy array loading** (`.npz` files) [link](https://numpy.org/doc/stable/reference/generated/numpy.load.html)

## Terms & Conditions 

- **Data Usage**
  - The dataset is provided for **research and competition** purposes within this challenge.
  - Redistribution of the dataset or derivatives **outside** the challenge requires permission from the original data owners and curators.

- **Attribution**
  - Works or publications using this dataset should cite:  
    **Yang et al., 2023 (source dataset)** and **Li et al., 2025 (related RTS modeling work)** (see citations below).

- **Submissions**
  - Predictions must follow the **required submission format** and reflect **automated model outputs** (no manual labeling of test sets).
  - External data usage, if used, must be documented in your method description.

- **Teams & Conduct**
  - Each team may include 1 to 5 members.
  - Do not share labels or predictions across different teams.  
  - Follow the Codabench code of conduct and site terms.

- **Privacy**
  - Team name, institution, and scores may appear on the **public leaderboard**.

- **Disqualification**
  - Violations of the rules, data misuse, or attempts to game the leaderboard may result in removal from the competition.

> Questions about policy? Email [wenwen@asu.edu](mailto:wenwen@asu.edu), [chiayuhsu@asu.edu](mailto:chiayuhsu@asu.edu)

## Useful External Resources

- **Codabench Platform:** <https://www.codabench.org>  
- **Competition Page:** <https://www.codabench.org/competitions/10283/>  
- **Forum:** <https://www.codabench.org/competitions/10283/forum>  
- **Dataset Paper (Yang et al., 2023):** <https://doi.org/10.1016/j.rse.2023.113495>  
- **Related RTS Modeling Work (Li et al., 2025):** <https://doi.org/10.1109/JSTARS.2025.3564310>

## Frequently Asked Questions 

**Q1. Where do I download the data?**

A: Register and receive approval on Codabench, then download the public release package from the **Files** section. You can also see the [Dataset Page](./dataset.qmd) for data details.

**Q2. What’s the submission format?**

A: COCO results-format JSON with compressed RLE masks. See **Participate -> Submission Format**.

**Q3. Can I use external data?**

A: Yes, but you must document it in your method description.
